channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-09
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates to both the `scienceverse/metacheck` and `JamieCummins/regcheck` projects. In `scienceverse/metacheck`, Lakens improved the cache and data handling in the `data_check` branch, enhancing the tool's functionality and user experience. Meanwhile, Jamie Cummins made significant updates to the `JamieCummins/regcheck` staging branch, including an update to the default OpenAI model and improvements to backend handling of insufficient evidence. These individual project advancements demonstrate the community's commitment to refining and expanding our research tools. As our projects continue to evolve, we can look forward to exploring potential connections and collaborations between `metacheck` and `regcheck`, such as integrating their respective strengths in data handling and AI model utilization to drive further innovation. By celebrating these achievements, we acknowledge the dedication and expertise of our community members, including Lakens and Jamie Cummins, who are driving progress in our shared pursuit of scientific advancement.

50 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck24 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. As stated in the commit message, "admin updates" were performed, but the specifics of these updates are not detailed. The branch was then merged into itself, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten. The commit messages do not provide further information on the nature of the administrative updates.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
